design_philosophy: Warm, cozy, inviting aesthetic. The UI should feel like a comfortable coffee shop, avoiding sterile corporate or overly dark gaming themes. Colors are drawn from coffee ingredients: espresso, latte, warm sand.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use CSS Grid with gap-6 for dashboards and layouts. The 'Control Room' grid is ideal for the Statistics and Warehouse screens.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-xl for cards, rounded-lg for buttons, rounded-2xl for main modals
layout_and_spacing.shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(62,39,35,0.06)] for subtle depth on cards.

components.buttons: Softly rounded, solid background for primary (bg-[#8D6E63] text-white hover:bg-[#6D4C41]), outline for secondary (border-[#8D6E63] text-[#8D6E63] hover:bg-[#F5F5DC]). Must include transition-all duration-200.
components.cards: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#D7CCC8] rounded-xl shadow-sm p-6.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs with border-[#D7CCC8] focus:ring-[#8D6E63] focus:border-[#8D6E63] rounded-lg bg-[#FDFBF7].
components.tabs: Shadcn tabs heavily customized. Active tab should have text-[#3E2723] and border-b-2 border-[#8D6E63] or soft rounded bg-[#E8DCC4].
components.modals: Shadcn dialogs. Use backdrop-blur-sm with bg-black/20 for the overlay. Dialog content bg-[#FDFBF7] rounded-2xl border-[#D7CCC8].

animation_and_motion.hover: Subtle transform translate-y-[-2px] and shadow elevation for interactive cards.
animation_and_motion.transitions: transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out for layout changes.
animation_and_motion.events: Use Framer Motion or simple CSS animations for random event popups (scale-in).

icons.usage: Use icons for resources (Coins, Star, Calendar), ingredients (Package, CupSoda, Wheat), and navigation.

coffee_shop_bg.description: Cozy cafe with baked goods, used for main game screen background or splash screen

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text colors (#1E130C, #5D4037) have sufficient contrast against #FDFBF7 and #FFFFFF.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, game actions, navigation tabs, and resource displays MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='buy-ingredient-btn', data-testid='start-day-btn', data-testid='resource-money'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application specifically as a fixed 1024x768 web window game (use max-w-[1024px] h-[768px] mx-auto on a wrapper).
Language must be entirely in Russian as per user requirements.
Implement the Top Resource Bar permanently visible with Money, Reputation, and Day counter.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override them with the warm, cozy color palette specified.
Do not use generic blue/gray SaaS colors. Always tint grays with warmth (e.g., #D7CCC8 for borders).
Ensure the win condition (100,000 coins) and loss condition (bankruptcy/0 reputation) are tracked and trigger a game over/win modal.
Use standard lucide-react icons where custom game graphics are missing.
